'''Nebula Flight''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|Corellian attack fighters]] that participated in the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. One of the unit's [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] was [[Gorvan Peel]].<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
